summary: Goods Receipt (Wareneingang) Workflow Testing Complete. Backend: 17/17 tests PASS. Frontend: All UI components working correctly - intake form, unassigned list, assignment modal, and QR label modal.
seed_data_creation: Multiple test devices created via backend tests and UI testing (TEST-SN-*, SUBMIT-TEST-*, UI-TEST-SN-* prefixes)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Goods Receipt workflow fully tested. Backend endpoints: POST /api/asset-mgmt/inventory/intake (single), POST /api/asset-mgmt/inventory/intake/batch (batch), GET /api/asset-mgmt/inventory/unassigned (list), POST /api/asset-mgmt/inventory/assign/{sn} (assignment with Asset-ID generation). Frontend GoodsReceiptWorkflow component working with sub-tabs 'Wareneingang erfassen' and 'Nicht zugewiesen'. QR Code label modal shows after successful assignment.

P0_single_intake.details: POST /api/asset-mgmt/inventory/intake creates device with status 'unassigned', no Asset-ID yet

P0_single_intake_duplicate_rejection.details: Duplicate serial numbers rejected with 400 error

P0_batch_intake.details: POST /api/asset-mgmt/inventory/intake/batch creates multiple devices, skips duplicates

P0_unassigned_list.details: GET /api/asset-mgmt/inventory/unassigned returns list with type_summary, supports search and type filters

P0_location_assignment.details: POST /api/asset-mgmt/inventory/assign/{sn} assigns device to location, generates Asset-ID in format LOCATION-NN-TYPE-SUFFIX

P0_asset_id_generation.details: Asset-ID format verified: TESTLOC577-03-TAB-TSR for TSRID Tablet type

P0_label_data_generation.details: Assignment returns label data with qr_content, asset_id, type_label, location info

P0_frontend_intake_form.details: Serial number input, device type dropdown, add button, intake list table all working

P0_frontend_unassigned_tab.details: Shows type summary badges, device table with Zuweisen buttons, search and filter controls

P0_frontend_assignment_modal.details: Location dropdown, technician input, Asset-ID preview, confirm button working

P0_frontend_qr_label_modal.details: QR code displayed, Asset-ID, type, SN, location info, print button present

workflow_verified.step_1_intake: Device captured with SN only, status='unassigned', asset_id=null
workflow_verified.step_2_unassigned_list: Devices appear in unassigned tab with type summary
workflow_verified.step_4_label: QR code modal shown with print option, status changes to 'in_storage'
